DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF MOTION OF GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (TRANSACTION ID # 76575663) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF MISAEL ANDRES SANCHEZ JARQUIN FILED A NOTICE OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF THE ENTIRE ACTION ON SEPTEMBER 8, 2025, AND THE CLERK ENTERED A DISMISSAL ON THE SAME DAY, WHICH, NOTABLY, WAS BEFORE THE TIME THE OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION WAS DUE. IN LIGHT OF THE DISMISSAL, THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT'S MOTION OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication.

Defendant General Motors LLC's Motion for Summary Judgment or, in the Alternative, for Summary Adjudication is OFF CALENDAR.

Plaintiff Misael Andres Sanchez Jarquin filed a notice of dismissal without prejudice of the entire action on September 8, 2025, and the clerk entered a dismissal on the same day, which, notably, was before the time the opposition to Defendant's motion was due. In light of the dismissal, the court orders Defendant's motion off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Set For Trial On Nov-10-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
